data.title: Everything Blockchain Inc. joins Flare's XRPFi standard for treasury yield, becoming first U.S.-listed company to do so. VivoPower International previously committed $100 million in XRP. XRPFi aims to be institutional standard for corporate treasury yield. (Characters: 261)
data.description: Everything Blockchain Inc. (OTC: EBZT) has recently announced its adoption of Flare's XRPFi framework for digital asset treasury management, marking it as one among the pioneering U.S.-listed companies to do so. This move aligns EBZT with Nasdaq-listed VivoPower International (NASDAQ: VVPR), which earlier this year invested $100 million in XRP through the same model. These decisions underscore XRPFi's efforts to establish itself as the go-to institutional standard for corporate treasury yield. XRPFi, Flare's brainchild, seeks to revolutionize XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) - a transformation from its traditional utility. For further details, kindly refer to the full news on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Eric Trump praises Bitcoin for creating financial equality, though the examples he cited revolved around the wealthy and powerful.
data.description: During an event at Bitcoin Asia, President Trump praised the cryptocurrency as a tool for financial equality, despite citing examples involving wealthy individuals and large organizations.

data.title: Latin America construction market reached $9.11B in 2024, projected to grow at 4.20% CAGR, reaching $13.75B by 2034.
data.description: A report on the Latin America Construction Market projects significant growth from 2025 to 2034. In 2024, the market size was recorded at USD 9.11 billion. It is estimated to have a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.20% during the forecast period, potentially reaching close to USD 13.75 billion by 2034. This growth can be attributed to factors such as increased urbanization and a focus on sustainability, leading to the construction of tall buildings in the region with the use of advanced technologies.
